## Checklist

- [ ] `make check` passes (typecheck, lint, i18n lint, tests, build)
- [ ] Added or updated tests for new or changed behavior
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under the current `(unreleased)` section (skip for pure refactors with no user-visible effect)
- [ ] Updated `README.md` or `PRIVACY.md` if user-facing behavior or permissions changed
